name: Phase 1: New session startup checklist
description: On every new chat session in this workspace, remind the agent of the key safety rules and architecture constraints for Phase 1.

action.message:
A new session has started for the Phase 1 Agentic Navigation Planner workspace. Before making any changes, keep these non-negotiable rules in mind:

1. SAFETY: client.stop_car() must always be in a finally block after client.move().
2. SAFETY: Never auto-execute a plan — always require explicit user confirmation (y/yes in CLI, Execute button click in web UI).
3. SAFETY: DEEPRACER_PASSWORD must never be logged, hardcoded, or included in error messages.
4. ARCHITECTURE: agent.py has no I/O — all terminal/web I/O stays in main.py and app_ui.py.
5. ARCHITECTURE: The planner agent uses tools=[] — it only generates JSON plans, never calls tools directly.
6. ARCHITECTURE: execute_plan() must iterate ALL steps even if one fails (no short-circuiting).
7. TOOLS: All 6 public functions in deepracer_tools.py must have the @tool decorator.
8. TOOLS: All tool functions return error strings — they never raise exceptions to callers.

Ready to help with Phase 1.
